definitions.text: A deep caring for the existence of another.

examples: A mother’s love is not easily shaken.
My husband’s love is the most important thing in my life.

definitions.text: A profound and caring affection towards someone.
examples: A mother’s love is not easily shaken.
My husband’s love is the most important thing in my life.

definitions.text: To have a strong affection for (someone or something).
examples: I love my spouse. I love you! I love that song!

definitions.text: To be strongly inclined towards something; an emphatic form of like.
examples: I love walking barefoot on wet grass; I'd love to join the team; I love what you've done with your hair

definitions.text: Alternative form of lofe (“to praise, sell”).
